texto: The only magic that's left in the world right now is the magic that we make ourselves, deliberately. You're not going to stumble over enchantment by chance. You have to be open to it, looking for it, and when you first think you might have glimpsed it, you have to will it into your life with every machination available to you.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Megan Lindholm sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “The only magic that's left in the world right now is the magic that we make ourselves, deliberate…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, fantasy, magic, útil em momentos de magic.

texto: Music took her somewhere, and I used to wonder where. I thought it was dumb, the way she lived for a collection of sounds, for someone else's words and notes.
